svg.text: Tufte pass: a ranked ledger of the observation that changes the decision state next. This is not a beauty chart and not a composite score.
Read left to right: action class, candidate, current evidence, missing proof, and next concrete analysis.

The ladder intentionally surfaces blockers before attractive chemistry. It says what to do next, not which molecule is pretty.
